name: paq8px (context mixing, state of the art)
notes: PAQ-family context-mixing compressor; -5 is the documented default level, -9 a higher level of the same method (RAM-bounded). Extremely slow by design (~12 KB/s), so restricted to the compressible categories (text, documents) where context mixing pays off; on already-compressed images/video every compressor is ~100%, and the full 55 MB corpus is impractical at this throughput (itself a finding).

verify.detail: decompressed tar SHA-256 matches canonical tar
